title: Crispy Nostalgic Tunisian Dates Stir-fry
description: A tangy and crispy dish featuring clear honey caramelized with dates for a jain-friendly snack that brings back nostalgic memories.

ingredients.name: dates
ingredients.notes: use clear dates for best clarity

ingredients.name: honey
ingredients.notes: use clear honey to enhance the flavor without adding sweetness

instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Rinse and de-seed the dates, then cut them into bite-sized pieces.
Arrange date slices on a baking tray lined with parchment paper. Drizzle honey over the top of each slice evenly. Sprinkle salt for flavoring.
Roast in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and caramelized, turning halfway through cooking time to ensure even browning.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before stirring into a large pan with vegetable oil over medium heat. Cook until crispy on the edges and lightly golden, about 3-5 more minutes.
Serve immediately as a snack or garnish with fresh mint leaves for added freshness.
